title: We are in september 2015 and no news OF 3010 Release date
display_title: We are in september 2015 and no news OF 3010 Release date
wikitext:
[]: We are in september 2015 and no news OF 3.0+1.0 Release date Post by Shakivara777 » Thu Sep 10, 2015 6:52 am the rumors said that it will be released in december 2015 i dont think they can make its in less then 2 months

[]: Post by amitakartok » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:05 am Such rumors tend to be baseless. For all we know, the movie could just as well come out in 2017. Anno's been having problems; only he knows when he's up to continuing work on Eva, so let's leave him be.

[]: Post by Shakivara777 » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:18 am amitakartok wrote: Such rumors tend to be baseless. For all we know, the movie could just as well come out in 2017. Anno's been having problems; only he knows when he's up to continuing work on Eva, so let's leave him be.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:26 am Eh, iv'e seen worse

[]: Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:32 am Shakivara777 wrote: Bro 2012-2017/2018 its so much for a movie squel i think anno is no more a virgin

[]: Post by pwhodges » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:33 am Shakivara777 wrote: Bro 2012-2017/2018 its so much for a movie squel

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Sep 10, 2015 7:33 am There's nothing known about the 3.0 + 1.0 release date apart from unfounded rumors and baseless speculation. No luck here, I'm afraid. Also, since we've been down this path in multiple threads, I'm locking this one. There's absolutely nothing to be gained in discussing rumors.
